name: Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onions in butter until they are transparent.
2. Remove the onions from the pan and set aside.
3. Brown the meat cubes in the same pan.
4. Return the onions to the pan with the browned meat.
5. Stir in 2 tablespoons of flour, then add the mushrooms, ketchup, paprika, and sour cream.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Cook on low heat until the meat is tender.
8. If the beef mixture is too thick, thin it out with a little milk to reach the desired consistency.
9. Serve over cooked rice or noodles.
